story: UFC OKC results: Dricus du Plessis overwhelms Kamaru Usman for dominant win
title: Dricus du Plessis Shocks the World with Historic Win
script:
Dricus du Plessis lands 10 takedowns on Kamaru Usman in just 2 rounds. 
The South African middleweight fighter dominated the action-packed main event in Oklahoma City, outstriking and overpowering the two-time UFC welterweight champion. Du Plessis' aggressive attack led to a unanimous decision victory, improving his record to 21-3. 
The win positions du Plessis strongly in the middleweight title hunt, setting him up for a potential showdown with champion Israel Adesanya next. 
What's next for Kamaru Usman, who suffered his third loss in four fights?
